name: Ham & Shrimp Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon cayenne pepper, or to taste
1 tablespoon butter or margarine AND cooking oil
2 cups large shrimp (about 1 pound), cleaned & cooked
1 can peeled tomatoes (16 ounces), undrained & chopped
6 dashes Tabasco sauce, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium heat, cook onion, bell pepper, garlic, cayenne pepper, and herbs in butter and oil until tender.
2. Stir in remaining ingredients.
3. Cook for 10-15 minutes or until heated through, stirring occasionally.
4. Serve immediately.
